turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Hi, I would like to order a coffee today!

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! What kind of coffee would you like — something like an espresso, latte, or cappuccino?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Can I have a latte to go?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! Would you like that latte with regular milk, or do you prefer a non-dairy option like oat or soy?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Do you have almond milk?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, we do! Almond milk’s a popular choice. Would you like any flavor added — maybe vanilla or caramel?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Vanilla, please.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great choice! Would you like it hot or iced today?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: hot, please

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect. What size would you like — small, medium, or large?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: small, thank you

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it — a small hot vanilla almond latte to go. Would you like any pastries or snacks with that?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: what are your options?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: We’ve got croissants, muffins, banana bread, and a few cookies — chocolate chip or oatmeal raisin. Would you like to add one of those?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I would like a banana bread, please

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure thing! One slice of banana bread. Would you like it warmed up a bit?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, please

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, I’ll warm that up for you. Would you like to pay by card or cash today?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: By card

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, you can tap or insert your card just here. Would you like a receipt with your order?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, please

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: All set — here’s your receipt and your hot vanilla almond latte with warm banana bread. Would you like a napkin or any sugar on the side?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: No, it’s ok thank you

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, thanks so much! Enjoy your coffee and have a great day. ☕

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Thank you, you too

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Thanks! Take care and see you next time. 😊
